proposed_status_row.notes: First-pass bilingual derivation; cooperative reduced-form formulas and policy coefficient notation need PDF check.

unresolved_issues: OCR renders the policy-rule coefficient near paper Eqs. (61) and (77) as 9; derivation uses vartheta by inference.
The cooperative reduced-form inflation equation around paper Eq. (76) is not reliable enough from Markdown alone.
The source Markdown does not specify a standalone technology shock process.
